name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans secured by personal property and retail merchandise sales.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn shop chain with over 3,300 retail locations across 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is indexed in both the S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000, indicating its scale as a significant publicly-traded consumer finance operator.

FirstCash primarily serves cash and credit-constrained consumers through pawn loans—non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property—and retail merchandise sales. The company buys and sells jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments, and general merchandise. Beyond pawn loans, FirstCash offers layaway services (10% down payment plans), gold and precious metal buying, and retail inventory turnover. The company also operates AFF, a subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive geographic footprint and scale compared to independent pawn shops, offering consistent store locations for repeat customers. The company emphasizes quick cash access without credit checks and maintains transparent pawn loan structures on collateral-based lending. Their diversified revenue model combines pawn lending, retail merchandise sales, gold buying, and layaway services, reducing dependence on any single income stream.

For consumers, FirstCash represents a legitimate option for immediate cash needs without credit qualification, though pawn loans come with the inherent cost of losing personal property if loans aren't repaid. The non-recourse nature means borrowers have no personal liability beyond forfeiting collateral, which is protective but also means valuables are genuinely at risk. Like all pawn operations, interest rates and fees vary by location and loan terms, and the true cost of borrowing this way typically exceeds traditional alternatives.
pros: 3,300+ store locations across 29 U.S. states plus UK and Latin America provide convenient access for customers
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no personal liability or credit reporting—only collateral is at risk
Fast cash access with no credit checks or income verification required
Buys virtually any item of value (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, etc.) for immediate cash payment
Layaway service with low 10% down payment option provides alternative to pawn lending
Gold and precious metal buying specializes in quick conversion of items many people already own
Publicly-traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) suggests regulatory oversight and stability
cons: Pawn loans carry high interest rates and fees that can exceed 100%+ APR depending on location and loan structure
Risk of losing personal property permanently if loan plus interest and fees cannot be repaid within the loan term
Limited transparency on website regarding specific interest rates, terms, and conditions—requires visiting individual locations
Retail resale of forfeited merchandise at markup represents substantial cost markup beyond the original loan value
Primarily serves credit-constrained consumers, suggesting more vulnerable populations may be target market
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash for emergencies without credit qualification or background checks
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they can temporarily pledge for short-term loans
Consumers seeking to sell gold, silver, platinum, or other precious metals for quick cash
Layaway shoppers who prefer smaller down payments (10%) over full upfront purchase or credit card financing
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for individuals experiencing genuine financial emergencies who have valuable personal property they can pledge and repay within the loan term, offering non-recourse access to cash without credit checks. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are extremely expensive borrowing mechanisms with triple-digit interest rates, and most people should exhaust other financing options (credit cards, personal loans, employer advances, credit union PALs) before pawning valuables, as the cost of default is permanent loss of property.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property
Retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying at cash prices
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
General merchandise sales from store inventory
Store locator tool to find nearest location
Online information about what items the company buys
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Non-recourse collateral-based lending (no personal liability beyond collateral)
Fast cash payment on items brought to stores
